title: Lido Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Lido Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
